# Asset Store Upload Matrix

This matrix reflects the current tracked repo state and the latest regenerated sale artifacts.

## HPR Typed Event Bus
- Package id: `com.hpr.eventbus`
- Release recommendation: `launch_now`
- Category recommendation: `Tools / Scripting`
- Price recommendation: `$9.99`
- Unitypackage: `com.hpr.eventbus/com.hpr.eventbus.unitypackage` (11529 bytes)
- UPM zip: `com.hpr.eventbus/com.hpr.eventbus_upm.zip` (23149 bytes)
- Listing draft: `com.hpr.eventbus/com.hpr.eventbus_listing_draft.md`
- Info file: `com.hpr.eventbus/com.hpr.eventbus_info.txt`
- Screenshots:
  - `com.hpr.eventbus/screenshots/01_overview.png` â€” Overview of the typed event bus architecture and included API surface.
  - `com.hpr.eventbus/screenshots/02_workflow.png` â€” Publisher to event transport to multiple subscriber workflow.
  - `com.hpr.eventbus/screenshots/03_details.png` â€” Headless and Unity scene integration details and boundaries.
- Cover art recommendation: Use screenshots/01_overview.png as the initial store cover image.
- Launch reason: Clear standalone value, isolated API surface, strong reusable fit across gameplay and tool layers, and easy screenshotable story once event flow is visualized.

## HPR Weapon Data Kit
- Package id: `com.hpr.weapons`
- Release recommendation: `second_wave`
- Category recommendation: `Templates / Systems`
- Price recommendation: `$9.99`
- Unitypackage: `com.hpr.weapons/com.hpr.weapons.unitypackage` (13290 bytes)
- UPM zip: `com.hpr.weapons/com.hpr.weapons_upm.zip` (27628 bytes)
- Listing draft: `com.hpr.weapons/com.hpr.weapons_listing_draft.md`
- Info file: `com.hpr.weapons/com.hpr.weapons_info.txt`
- Screenshots:
  - `com.hpr.weapons/screenshots/01_overview.png` â€” Overview of authored weapon data, fire modes, and scope.
  - `com.hpr.weapons/screenshots/02_workflow.png` â€” Weapon data authored once and consumed by runtime systems.
  - `com.hpr.weapons/screenshots/03_details.png` â€” Commercial recommendation and non-goals for the package.
- Cover art recommendation: Use screenshots/01_overview.png as the initial cover only if you launch it later as a standalone SKU.
- Launch reason: Technically clean, but the current value proposition is data-definition heavy and weaker than the first-wave systems unless paired with a stronger runtime controller or bundle story.

## HPR World Asset Registry

- Release recommendation: `bundle_only`

- Price recommendation: `bundle_only`
- Unitypackage: `com.hpr.world/com.hpr.world.unitypackage` (13215 bytes)
- UPM zip: `com.hpr.world/com.hpr.world_upm.zip` (28032 bytes)

- Info file: `com.hpr.world/com.hpr.world_info.txt`
- Screenshots:
  - `com.hpr.world/screenshots/01_overview.png` â€” Overview of world metadata and registry assets.
  - `com.hpr.world/screenshots/02_workflow.png` â€” Metadata-to-registry-to-consumer workflow.
  - `com.hpr.world/screenshots/03_details.png` â€” Bundle-only commercial recommendation and current non-goals.
- Cover art recommendation: Do not allocate standalone cover art; keep this package as a bundle/supporting component.
